news.Title: Forget SaaS: Why AI Agents Could Make ServiceNow and Palantir Technologies the Next Trillion-Dollar Platforms
news.Content:
Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue »

The fear about how agentic artificial intelligence (AI) is making software-as-a-service (SaaS) companies obsolete is real. Many SaaS stocks have tanked over the past year, and these companies are trying to step up their models to remain relevant in an AI world.

The fear has reached SaaS powerhouses ServiceNow (NYSE: NOW) and Palantir Technologies (NASDAQ: PLTR) , and their stocks are down 33% and 23% this year, respectively. But agentic AI may not be the threat to these companies that some investors are worried it will be. Here's what you need to know.

What is agentic AI?

SaaS has become the go-to model for software companies, providing recurring revenue through monthly subscriptions. Clients don't get a one-time package that can become obsolete over time but an ongoing relationship with upgrades. SaaS can cover everything from Salesforce 's marketing software to Figma 's graphic design and Microsoft 's Word.

Agentic AI allows the client to automate many of the actions an SaaS program does, making it superfluous. In a case of a subscription that acts as a database, for example, which still needs human interaction to analyze data and take action, the agent can add data, analyze it, and create marketing campaigns based on it.

How does SaaS play into agentic AI?

The SaaS stocks that are hurting the most are the legacy kind. These are companies that have been around for years and are based on older technology. Although everyone is scrambling to keep up with AI, even if these companies switch to an AI profile, their services will be less in demand precisely because their models become more efficient. In other words, they can perform more work faster, needing fewer "seats," or subscriptions.

ServiceNow and Palantir are both AI-based, and their businesses already handle much of the work an agent would. ServiceNow launched its Control Tower last year, before the market started worrying about agentic AI. As the name implies, it's a "centralized command center" to manage a company's AI program.

Even if agentic AI handles many software applications, it still needs to be unified for maximum efficiency and value, and that's where ServiceNow comes in. The company has thousands of clients with long-standing relationships, giving it exposure to further deepen their dependency on its platform.

Story Continues

It's similar for Palantir, which not only unifies disparate datasets but also sends trained engineers to clients to map out its ontology and create a customized system to pull the most actionable insights. Its government and commercial contracts span years, and it's already deeply embedded in their systems. These are advantages that can't simply be replaced by agents and give them a leg up.

As companies rely more on agents, they'll need platforms like Control Tower and Palantir's Artificial Intelligence Platform (AIP) to manage them, creating compelling long-term opportunities.

A word of caution

Both ServiceNow and Palantir are high-growth, profitable companies that are demonstrating strength despite the SaaS stock rout. However, that doesn't necessarily mean they're screaming buys right now, and that's because of one very important factor: valuation. They trade at 61 and 154 times trailing-12-month earnings, respectively, even at their lower prices.

While they may have long growth runways, their upside may be limited by their current price.

news.Title: Could Agentic AI Be Apple's Next Big Tailwind?
news.Content:
Artificial intelligence (AI) helped many tech leaders improve their businesses. Nvidia saw surging demand for its GPUs (Graphics Processing Units), Meta Platforms used the technology to increase engagement on its apps through algorithms, and the hyperscalers -- Amazon , Alphabet , and Microsoft -- launched a variety of AI services they offer through the cloud. Meanwhile, many thought that Apple (NASDAQ: AAPL) was lagging its similarly sized tech peers in capitalizing on AI, but as the industry shifts toward agentic AI -- or systems that can autonomously plan and execute tasks -- could it become a tailwind for Apple?

Missed Nvidia in 2009? This Rare Signal Is Flashing Again. In 2009, a "Double Down" signal flashed for a little-known chipmaker called Nvidia. For the first time in years, that same "Total Conviction" signal is flashing for a company 1/100th the size of Nvidia. Continue »

Analysts are waking up

Wall Street is starting to recognize Apple's potential in the AI industry , with several analysts expressing bullish sentiment. For instance, Wamsi Mohan , an analyst at Bank of America , recently increased his price target for the stock to $380, up from $330. The reason: Apple could be a winner of the shift to agentic AI. Mohan thinks that the iPhone maker could generate between $15 billion and $30 billion in AI-related revenue by the fiscal year 2030. Note that this is not that much revenue by Apple's standards, which generates over $400 billion in annual sales. However, provided agentic AI reaches the heights some expect -- Nvidia's CEO Jensen Huang predicted we will eventually have billions of AI agents -- it could be just the beginning for Apple.

Slow and steady wins the race

It's worth noting that Apple isn't typically the first to market with new technologies. The company takes its time, keeps things close to the vest, and finds ways to introduce its own spin on existing tech to generate significant excitement and make plenty of money. There is a long list of Apple products that demonstrate this trend. For instance, Apple did not create earphones, but its AirPods introduced an innovative twist on the established model and became highly popular.

Even Apple's most famous product, the iPhone, is an example, and perhaps the best. Smartphones existed before Apple launched the first generation of its iPhone, but the company's device was a reinvention that proved highly popular and a veritable trendsetter. We can still see the results of that revolution today, as Apple's iPhone segment remains the largest by revenue.

Story Continues

Could the company do the same with AI? My view is that it can. Apple has already made progress in this quest. Its latest iPhone, the 17, is driving a solid renewal cycle, partly thanks to various AI-powered features. Apple reported the best top-line growth rate it has had in over three years in its most recent quarter (after also doing the same in the previous quarter), thanks to the iPhone 17.

AAPL Revenue (Quarterly YoY Growth) data by YCharts

Also, Apple has a significant advantage that can help it capitalize on AI. The company has a large installed base with more than two billion devices in circulation. This factor can help in several ways. First, it allows Apple to reach a vast number of customers quickly by leveraging its large network of existing users upon launching new AI features. Second, it can improve its switching costs, especially for customers who own multiple devices, if certain AI features work only on Apple devices (including some that allow two or more of them to sync), creating a powerful incentive not to switch.

Third, Apple can access significant data on how its customers use its AI services, allowing it to make tweaks and improvements as needed. In other words, it can help boost the company's network effects. All these advantages could help the company capitalize on agentic AI.

Is Apple stock a buy?

Apple is currently near its all-time high. But some investors will point out that it still faces obstacles, including tariffs and regulatory scrutiny. Even with those caveats, my view is that Apple remains an outstanding long-term bet, and not just because of its AI work that could eventually pay rich dividends. Two of Apple's greatest strengths are its deep ecosystem and strong customer loyalty. These grant the company a wide moat and umpteen monetization opportunities.

Further, Apple continues to ramp up its high-margin services segment, which will eventually help boost its profits as it accounts for a larger share of revenue. And lastly, Apple is a solid dividend stock that has raised its payouts by 89.5% over the past decade. All these reasons (and more) highlight why Apple stock is a buy.

Missed Nvidia in 2009? This Rare Signal Is Flashing Again. In 2009, a "Double Down" signal ...

news.Title: Here Are the 3 Cheapest Magnificent Seven Stocks According to a Popular Metric. Are They Buys?
news.Content: The Magnificent Seven is a group of tech (or tech-adjacent) companies that are among the largest on the market. The list includes Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOG) (NASDAQ: GOOGL) , Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN) , Apple (NASDAQ: AAPL) , Meta Platforms (NASDAQ: META) , Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT) , Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) , and Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) . They are called "magnificent" partly because of their performance over the past decade or so: Every single one has outpaced broader equities. Some would argue that most of them still have plenty of upside left, but after the sustained runs we ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia's forward P/E of 23.8 makes it the second-cheapest among the Magnificent Seven, despite its leadership in AI GPUs.
• Nvidia's Q1 FY2027 revenue reached $81.6 billion, an 85% year-over-year increase, beating internal projections.
• The company expects $20 billion in revenue for its stand-alone CPU business and projects a $200 billion addressable market.
• Microsoft's forward P/E of 24.5 positions it as the third cheapest Magnificent Seven stock, with plans to spend $190 billion on capex in 2026 for cloud and AI.
• Despite potential competition and a shift from AI training to inference, Nvidia is viewed as a strong buy due to its GPU dominance and CUDA ecosystem.
news.Keywords: Magnificent Seven, valuation, AI tailwind, GPU market, CPU market

news.Title: Strait of Hormuz carries more than oil, handling 20% of global data flows
news.Content: Investing.com -- The Strait of Hormuz has emerged as a potential vulnerability for global internet infrastructure, with threats to undersea fiber-optic cables raising concerns among major technology companies and investors, according to a note from Yardeni Research. ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The Strait of Hormuz poses a potential vulnerability to global internet infrastructure, with threats to undersea fiber-optic cables.
• Approximately 20% of global internet and financial data flows pass through this strategic waterway, impacting major tech companies like Meta and Microsoft.
• Developing alternative routes would require substantial investment and years to implement.
• Disruptions to undersea cables highlight infrastructure exposure to physical risks and geopolitical tensions.
• Seven major cables serving Gulf-based AI projects pass through the Strait, creating a potential bottleneck for cloud computing and data centers.
news.Keywords: geopolitical risk, undersea cables, data flow, infrastructure vulnerability, AI hubs

news.Title: Wall Street Has a Consensus on This AI Stock. The Consensus Is Dead Wrong.
news.Content: There is a version of the artificial intelligence (AI) story in which every company with the word "artificial intelligence" in its pitch deck gets a pass and an instant flood of investment. Revenue misses get attributed to "transition periods." Widening losses get called "strategic investment." And analysts who should know better slap a hold rating on a deteriorating business and call it balanced. That is what is happening with C3.ai (NYSE: AI) right now, in my opinion. And ...
news.AI_Summary:
• C3.ai (AI) faces significant competitive pressure from larger players like Microsoft, Salesforce, and ServiceNow, who are embedding AI into their existing offerings.
• The company's value proposition of pre-built enterprise AI applications is being systematically dismantled by competitors.
• C3.ai missed its own revenue guidance for Q1 FY2026, reporting around $50 million, and posted a loss per share of $0.40.
• The consensus analyst rating of 'hold' with a price target implying significant upside is seen as inconsistent given the stock's performance and competitive challenges.
• The rise of purpose-built AI agents and open-source tooling also provides alternative solutions for enterprises.
news.Keywords: competitive landscape, enterprise AI, revenue miss, market share erosion, analyst consensus

news.Title: 5-star analyst sets jaw-dropping SanDisk stock price target
news.Content: Barclays moved on SanDisk on May 27. The day after, Mizuho followed. When top-ranked analysts at two different firms raise targets on the same stock on back-to-back days, each arriving via a different methodology, the second note is worth reading carefully. Mizuho's argument is built around numbers that extend well beyond the last earnings report and further into the future than most coverage of this stock has focused on. What Mizuho changed and the analyst behind the call Vijay Rakesh, a five-star analyst at Mizuho Securities, raised his price ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Mizuho Securities analyst Vijay Rakesh raised SanDisk's (SNDK) price target to $1,825, implying 12% upside.
• Rakesh increased FY2027 revenue estimates to $45.3 billion (vs. $43.6B consensus) and EPS estimates to $184.95 (vs. $180.14 consensus).
• The bull case is founded on persistent NAND supply tightness expected through 2027, with non-AI customers undersupplied by 30-50%.
• Agentic AI is identified as a new growth driver, potentially increasing NAND demand from 2027 due to its requirement for more persistent storage.
• Near-term tailwinds include rising demand tied to High Bandwidth Flash and CMX rack deployments.
news.Keywords: NAND supply, agentic AI, revenue estimates, EPS estimates, structural tightness

• 中華電信股東會因勞資爭議，從29日上午9點開到30日凌晨3點28分才結束，創下台股及中華電信最長紀錄。

• 工會認為公司在勞資議題上承諾跳票，動員幹部施壓，要求共享經營成果。
• 公司回應，今年已定額加薪2,400元並發放一次性獎金，認為持續要求加薪不利於長期經營。
• 董事長多次提醒股東會應回歸公司治理與股東權益討論，而非勞資會議。
news.Keywords: 勞資爭議,股東會,工會訴求,薪資調整,公司治理

news.Title: 台股瘋漲國內消費沒跟上？學者揭台股財富效果失靈真相
news.Content: 台股多頭氣勢如虹，2026年還沒過半，台股已經接連飛躍3萬點、4萬點大關，不論是咖啡廳、菜市場，都可聽到民眾談論股市行情，投資台股儼然成為全民運動。然而，股市大漲未能等比例反映在國內消費，學 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台股屢創新高，但國內消費成長力道相對溫和，學者分析財富效果帶動實體經濟的效果有限。
• 原因一為股市賺到的資金續留股市尋找更好標的，或用於房屋增貸、小額貸款等槓桿操作。
• 原因二為部分資金流向海外旅遊，導致國內服務業對景氣熱絡感受有限。
• 儘管主計總處上修民間消費實質成長率至3.6%，但國人在國外消費成長率更高。
• 學者擔憂，若股市漲勢無法轉化為實體經濟動能，且年輕人過度投入股市可能降低就業意願。
news.Keywords: 財富效果,國內消費,股市資金流向,海外旅遊,實體經濟

news.Title: 驚！「神秘大戶」5月買爆42億台股 光退佣就賺一棟房？他吐背後關鍵
news.Content:
台股5月熱爆大漲5806點，昨（29日）最後一個交易日更爆出1.87兆元歷史天量。股市達人「權證小哥」在臉書曬出5月對帳單，光是單一戶頭的手續費就達487萬、交易稅379萬，單月狂敲42.7億元成交量。他幽默表示，打單（下單交易）也能為社會盡點心力，目標是讓全民「普發2萬」；面對網友驚呼42億成交量「退佣（折讓）有超過420萬嗎？」小哥也親自回應「超過」，神級實力讓全網驚豔，更有人直呼「光退佣就賺走一棟房」。

台股5月成交量逼近26.3兆

台股5月加權指數持續狂飆創高，不僅讓證交所與各大券商手續費賺得盆滿缽滿，國庫更是成為最大贏家。統計顯示，台股5月整體成交金額高達近26.29兆元，換算日均成交值約達1兆3145億元，推估財政部單月可望大舉進帳約630.96億元的證交稅，有望再度刷新歷史紀錄。

事實上，這波台股強勢狂漲的吸金效應自4月已顯現。據財政部日前公布4月全國稅收初步統計，單月證交稅實徵淨額達546億元，歷年單月新高，這也是證交稅連續2個月突破500億元大關。與去年同期相比，單月大增368億元、年增幅達2.1倍，創下民國99年2月以來新高，累計前4個月證交稅實徵淨額1783億元也同步創高。

在券商獲利部分，證交所統計指出，4月份大盤總成交值已達19.139兆元，帶動證券商經紀手續費收入單月成長27.66億元，月增達12.89％；累計前4個月證券商經紀手續費收入因成交量暴增，較去年同期狂增422.03億元，年增幅高達115.54％，呈現翻倍爆發。

權證小哥單月敲出42億成交額

在台股5月飆漲近6000點的淘金浪潮中，一票大戶獲利豐厚。權證小哥在臉書曬出5月個人戶頭結算中，光是「這個戶頭」，手續費 487萬、交易稅379萬，看來一整年渴望貢獻個5000萬，他直言想到因為稅收超徵，全民普發1萬的時候，就覺得打單（下單交易），也能為社會盡點心力。下個月繼續加油，目標普發2萬。

該篇貼文一出，隨即引發大批網友朝聖，紛紛留言驚嘆：「請受我一拜」、「真正的繳稅大戶」、「光手續費就可以直接買一間房子了」、「操作像在打電動玩具，重點是還能賺錢，太強了」、「感謝小哥 請繼續為台灣經濟加油」。

甚至有熱心網友留言詢問關鍵內幕：「成交金額高達42億，折讓（退佣）可以退到420萬嗎？」對此，權證小哥也親自回應「超過」二字，再度引發市場對頂級大戶退佣成數的無限想像。

news.Title: Are Summer Headwinds Already Pricing Into Stocks?
news.Content: The average price-to-earnings ratio for the S&P 500 index (SNPINDEX: ^GSPC) over time is around 19x. Today, the S&P 500's P/E ratio is around 27.5x. That suggests that the market is not fully pricing in potential summer headwinds. And yet, markets often climb higher amid uncertainty. Here's what you need to know as you make investment decisions at the start of June. There is a material "wall of worry" An old Wall ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The S&P 500's P/E ratio of 27.5x is significantly higher than its historical average of 19x, suggesting potential overvaluation.
• Geopolitical conflicts in the Middle East are driving up energy prices, contributing to inflation and concerns about a global recession.
• Chevron CEO Mike Wirth indicates oil prices are more likely to rise due to reduced supply and impact on global oil reserves.
• Walmart provided a muted outlook for the rest of fiscal 2027 despite a strong first quarter, reflecting broader economic concerns.
• Conservative investors may consider increasing cash balances or focusing on value stocks like Coca-Cola, which offers a dividend yield above the market average.

news.Title: Meta, TikTok, Snap, and YouTube settle school lawsuit for $27M
news.Content: Investing.com -- Meta Platforms, TikTok parent ByteDance, Snap, and Alphabet’s YouTube have agreed to pay roughly $27 million to settle claims brought by a Kentucky school district alleging their platforms contributed to a student mental health crisis, Reuters reported on Friday. ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Meta Platforms, TikTok, Snap, and YouTube have agreed to a $27 million settlement in a lawsuit filed by a Kentucky school district.
• Meta will pay the largest portion of the settlement at $9 million, with TikTok and Snap paying $8 million each, and YouTube paying $2.01 million.
• The lawsuit alleged that the platforms contributed to a student mental health crisis by designing features to keep young users engaged.
• The settlements do not require any admission of wrongdoing or changes to platform features.
• This case was seen as a bellwether for over 1,200 similar lawsuits filed by school districts across the US.
news.Keywords: litigation, settlement, mental health, social media, youth engagement

news.Title: This Fund Manager Has a Brilliant Strategy for Investing in AI Stocks
news.Content: Gavin Baker, the Chief Investment Officer of the hedge fund Atreides Management, has established itself as one of the top tech investors operating today. In eight years managing the OTC Portfolio at Fidelity, Baker achieved a compound annual return rate of more than 19% and outperformed 99% of his peers on Morningstar. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Gavin Baker, CIO of Atreides Management, believes the AI sector is 'cross-sectionally inefficient' regarding valuations.
• He notes that memory stocks (e.g., Micron) and Nvidia are trading at low P/E ratios, while power, cooling, and optical stocks (e.g., Lumentum, Coherent) have much higher multiples.
• Baker suggests that if the high multiples for optical stocks are justified, then memory and Nvidia stocks should increase significantly.
• Conversely, if Nvidia and Micron's multiples are correct, the higher-multiple stocks may underperform.
• The analysis favors cheaper AI-related stocks like Micron and Nvidia over those relying on multiple expansion for growth.
news.Keywords: AI sector, valuation, P/E ratio, semiconductor, investment strategy

news.Title: 台股衝4萬點卻沒上車？他好奇「沒跟到的人怎麼想」　網：最怕的是只會後悔
news.Content:

news.Title: 台股衝4萬點 台中婦急領200萬「繳稅」？警銀苦勸讓她驚醒

news.Title: GlobalFoundries Maps Path to 40% Margins as Silicon Photonics Demand Builds
news.Content: Quantum Computing's Commercial Breakout Has Arrived GlobalFoundries (NASDAQ:GFS) Chief Financial Officer Sam Franklin said the chipmaker sees a path to significantly higher profitability over the next several years, driven by a mix shift toward faster-growing end markets, technology services, manufacturing productivity and better utilization of its existing footprint. Speaking at a TD Cowen event hosted by analyst Krish Sankar, Franklin said GlobalFoundries is targeting an exit gross margin of about 30% in 2026, 40% by the end of 2028 and 45% over the longer term. He said the company’s margin plan is tied to investments already made, customer design-win momentum ...
news.AI_Summary:
• GlobalFoundries (GFS) aims to significantly increase profitability, targeting a 40% gross margin by the end of 2028 and 45% long-term.
• Margin improvements are expected from a mix shift towards faster-growing end markets (communications, data center, automotive, IoT), technology services, and manufacturing efficiency.
• The company is increasing capital spending to $1.3-$1.4 billion this year, reflecting strong demand visibility and investments in areas like silicon photonics.
• GlobalFoundries targets a $1 billion silicon photonics run rate by the end of 2028 and $2 billion long-term, driven by pluggable optical transceivers and co-packaged optics.
• Technology services revenue is expected to grow to 12%-14% of total revenue long-term.
news.Keywords: gross margin, silicon photonics, capital expenditure, technology services, semiconductor

news.Title: Social media companies pay $27 million to settle Kentucky school district’s lawsuit over social media harms, records show
news.Content: By Diana Novak Jones May 29 (Reuters) - A Kentucky school district secured approximately $27 million in settlements from social media companies over claims they fueled a student mental‑health crisis, with Meta Platforms paying the largest amount at $9 million, according to records seen by ‌Reuters on Friday that reveal the settlement's financial terms for the first time. More from Yahoo Scout Why are ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Meta Platforms, Alphabet (Google), Snap, and ByteDance have settled a lawsuit with a Kentucky school district for approximately $27 million, related to social media's impact on student mental health.
• Meta paid $9 million, Alphabet $2.01 million, Snap $8 million, and ByteDance $8 million.
• The school district accused the companies of designing addictive platforms that fueled anxiety, depression, and self-harm among students.
• This case was considered a bellwether for over 1,200 similar lawsuits filed by school districts nationwide.
• Meta has previously warned investors that legal and regulatory issues concerning youth social media use could significantly impact its business and financial results.
news.Keywords: litigation, settlement, mental health, social media harms, regulatory risk

news.Title: The 180-Day Lease Holding Up SpaceX's $2 Trillion IPO
news.Content: Buried on page 13 of SpaceX's S-1 prospectus is the line item that has done more to justify a reported $2 trillion valuation than any other single disclosure in the filing. Anthropic, the rival AI company that Elon Musk publicly called "evil" earlier this year, is paying SpaceX $1.25 billion every month for compute capacity inside the Colossus 1 and Colossus 2 data centers in Memphis. The filing describes the payments running through May 2029. Annualized, that amounts to $15 billion a year. Spread across the full term, the deal totals roughly $45 billion. More News from Barchart ARM Stock ...
news.AI_Summary:
• SpaceX's potential $2 trillion IPO valuation is significantly influenced by a disclosed $1.25 billion monthly lease payment from Anthropic for compute capacity.
• This deal, initially appearing as a multi-year contract totaling ~$45 billion, was clarified by Elon Musk as a 180-day lease with a 90-day cancellation notice, significantly reducing its long-term value.
• SpaceX's AI segment revenue of $3.2 billion in 2025 (with $818 million in Q1 2026) is heavily reliant on this short-term Anthropic agreement, masking substantial losses in the segment.
• The clarification shifts the narrative from secured long-term revenue to a short-term rental, impacting investor perception of the AI infrastructure pivot and overall valuation.
news.Keywords: IPO valuation, compute capacity, lease agreement, AI infrastructure, revenue clarification

news.Title: AMZN Deepens Its AI-Powered Shopping Push: Where Is the Stock Headed?
news.Content: Amazon AMZN is deepening its bid to dominate conversational commerce. On May 13, 2026, it folded its Rufus shopping assistant and the Alexa+ assistant into a single agentic tool, Alexa for Shopping, now free to U.S. customers across the Amazon app, website, and Echo Show with no Prime membership or device required. The system carries a shopper's history ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Amazon is integrating its Rufus and Alexa assistants into a single AI tool, 'Alexa for Shopping,' to enhance conversational commerce.
• The AI shopping assistant drove nearly $12 billion in incremental sales in 2025, with over 300 million customers using Rufus.
• AWS is offering its Agentic Shopping Assistant architecture to external retailers, with Tapestry's Kate Spade as an early adopter.
• Advertising revenues rose 24% to $17.2 billion in Q1, and net sales climbed 17% to $181.5 billion.

news.Title: Can KLA's Greenfield Fab Exposure Spark Multi-Year Revenue Growth?
news.Content: KLA Corporation KLAC appears well-positioned to capitalize on the semiconductor industry’s next wave of greenfield fab investments, driven largely by booming AI infrastructure demand and expanding memory capacity requirements. Its strong exposure to process control intensity at advanced nodes could become a major catalyst for multi-year revenue growth. In the fiscal ...
news.AI_Summary:
• KLA Corporation is well-positioned to benefit from greenfield fab investments driven by AI infrastructure demand and memory capacity requirements.
• The company reported fiscal Q3 2026 revenues of $3.42 billion, up 11% year-over-year, with Semiconductor Process Control revenues up 13%.
• Greenfield opportunities in DRAM and NAND are expected to increase into 2027, supported by AI-driven demand for HBM and advanced logic chips.
• Process control intensity is rising due to complex chip architectures, larger die sizes, and advanced packaging.
• KLA expects its advanced packaging business to generate over $1 billion in revenue this year and continues to generate robust free cash flow, returning capital to shareholders.
news.Keywords: semiconductor equipment, greenfield fabs, process control, AI demand, free cash flow

news.Title: TikTok Pushes Deeper Into Music as Label Relationships Shift
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . TikTok's music strategy is becoming a sharper investor signal for ByteDance's broader platform ambitions, as the company appears to be pulling back from traditional label-facing relationships while moving ...
news.AI_Summary:
• TikTok is deepening its involvement in music, focusing on direct artist services, distribution, and advertising-related licensing, shifting away from traditional label relationships.
• Initiatives like SoundOn (music distribution) and a commercial music library for ads aim to give TikTok more control over its music ecosystem.
• TikTok has launched a partnership with Apple allowing Apple Music subscribers to listen to full tracks within TikTok.
• Despite industry tensions and layoffs in its music division, TikTok remains a crucial platform for the music industry due to its billion-plus monthly users.
• ByteDance, TikTok's parent company, views music more as a cost center but is exploring ways to reshape music economics on its own terms.
news.Keywords: music strategy, direct artist services, advertising licensing, platform ambitions, ecosystem control

news.Title: AMD Takes Quieter China Path
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . Advanced Micro Devices ( AMD , Financials ) is taking a quieter approach in China than ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) is pursuing a less public strategy in China compared to Nvidia, but the market remains crucial.
• China accounts for approximately 20% of AMD's revenue across PCs, gaming, and some data center products.
• AMD holds about 4% of China's AI chip market and offers alternatives to Nvidia's CUDA through its ROCm open-source software platform.
• U.S. export controls limit the sale of advanced chips in China, affecting both Nvidia and AMD.
• AMD's software tools are less mature than Nvidia's, and export regulations pose challenges in the Chinese market.
news.Keywords: China market, AI chips, export controls, software platform, market share

news.Title: Tesla Robotaxi Fleet Trails Waymo in Texas
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . Tesla Inc. ( TSLA , Financials ) is still in the early innings of ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Tesla's robotaxi fleet in Texas is significantly smaller than Waymo's, with only 42 authorized vehicles compared to Waymo's much larger fleet.
• This data highlights that scaling the robotaxi service remains a gradual process for Tesla, despite years of discussion about self-driving technology.
• Key factors for robotaxi deployment include regulatory clearance, safety performance, operational reliability, and public trust.
• Waymo currently holds a lead in Texas deployment due to its larger operational footprint.
• Tesla's next challenge is to translate its technology roadmap into a commercially viable and larger fleet.
news.Keywords: robotaxi, autonomous driving, fleet size, Texas market, commercial scaling

news.Title: Google India Ad Ruling Raises Trademark Risk
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . Alphabet ( GOOGL , Financials ) is facing fresh scrutiny in India ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Alphabet (Google) has been ordered by the Delhi High Court to pay $31,600 in damages for trademark infringement in India.
• The court ruled that Google allowed competitors to use a company's brand name as an advertising keyword.
• This ruling could empower Indian businesses to challenge keyword advertising practices, potentially impacting Google's search advertising model.
• Search advertising relies heavily on keyword bidding, making Google vulnerable to increased legal risk in India if more such challenges arise.
• The case highlights potential changes to the economics of online advertising, where brands often pay to protect their names from rivals.
news.Keywords: trademark infringement, keyword advertising, legal risk, India market, search advertising

news.Title: Tesla Stock Fans Just Got Worrying News From Texas
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . Tesla ( NASDAQ:TSLA ) has a much smaller robotaxi footprint in Texas ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Tesla has a substantially smaller robotaxi presence in Texas compared to Waymo, with only 42 authorized vehicles versus Waymo's 577.
• Other autonomous vehicle companies like Avride (Nebius), Nuro, and Zoox (Amazon) also have larger authorized fleets in Texas than Tesla.
• New Texas regulations have tightened oversight of commercial self-driving vehicles, with authorization rules becoming enforceable.
• Tesla launched its Texas robotaxi pilot in June 2025, while Waymo launched in March of the same year.
• Tesla's service is currently limited to parts of Austin, Dallas, and Houston, whereas Waymo operates in multiple major cities across Texas.
news.Keywords: robotaxi, autonomous vehicles, Texas regulations, fleet deployment, competitive landscape

news.Title: Can CRUS' Audio Converter Launch Diversify Revenue Streams & Boost Sales?
news.Content: The professional and prosumer audio industry is evolving rapidly. Against this backdrop, Cirrus Logic CRUS has recently introduced a new portfolio of nine audio converters, including analog-to-digital converters (ADCs), digital-to-analog converters (DACs) and CODECs, designed to deliver premium audio quality while maintaining an optimized price-to-performance ratio. The initiative aims to expand CRUS’ audio converter portfolio and reinforces its ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Cirrus Logic (CRUS) introduced nine new audio converters (ADCs, DACs, CODECs) aimed at the professional and prosumer audio market, estimated at $9 billion globally.
• The new portfolio includes enhanced analog capabilities and hybrid gain control technology, offering scalability for product development.
• This launch aims to diversify revenue streams beyond smartphones and expand CRUS's presence in professional audio and content creation.
• Competitors Qualcomm and Analog Devices are also active in related technology sectors, with Qualcomm expanding into custom silicon and AI data centers.
• CRUS shares have gained 77.3% in the past year, and the stock appears attractive with a Value Score of A.
news.Keywords: new product portfolio, audio converters, revenue diversification, competitive landscape, professional audio market

news.Title: Will Autonomous Agent Growth Accelerate CRWV's Data Center Utilization?
news.Content: The rapid rise of autonomous AI agents is creating favorable demand for cloud infrastructure, and few companies are better positioned to benefit than CoreWeave, Inc. CRWV. Recognizing this trend, CRWV has unveiled a unified set of agentic ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The rise of autonomous AI agents is significantly increasing demand for cloud infrastructure, benefiting companies like CoreWeave (CRWV).
• CoreWeave has launched a new platform with agentic AI capabilities focused on real-time learning and continuous improvement, addressing the limitations of traditional AI agent cycles.
• The platform's key pillars include serverless reinforcement learning, production-ready inference, agent observability, and autonomous improvement, aiming to lower costs and improve reliability.
• This trend is expected to drive higher data center utilization, revenue growth, and improved operating leverage for CoreWeave.
• Microsoft (MSFT) is also capitalizing on AI momentum, with Azure cloud infrastructure expansion and strong Copilot adoption contributing to a $37 billion annual revenue run rate for its AI business.

news.Title: NVIDIA vs. Marvell Technology: Which AI Chip Stock Has the Edge?
news.Content: NVIDIA Corporation NVDA and Marvell Technology, Inc. MRVL are among the biggest winners of the ongoing artificial intelligence (AI) infrastructure boom. Both companies are benefiting from rising investments in AI data centers, networking, accelerated computing and cloud infrastructure. NVIDIA dominates the AI graphics processing unit (GPU) market with its full-stack AI platform, while Marvell Technology is rapidly expanding its presence in AI networking, optical connectivity and custom AI chips for hyperscalers. As AI spending continues to surge globally, investors must be wondering which stock offers the better mix of growth, profitability and valuation support right now. NVIDIA Dominates AI Infrastructure ...
news.AI_Summary:
• NVIDIA (NVDA) and Marvell Technology (MRVL) are key beneficiaries of the AI infrastructure boom, with both companies experiencing significant revenue growth.
• NVIDIA leads in AI GPUs with its full-stack platform, reporting Q1 FY27 record revenues of $81.6 billion (up 85% YoY) and strong data center growth (up 92% YoY).
• Marvell is expanding rapidly in AI networking and custom chips, with Q1 FY27 revenues up 28% YoY to $2.4 billion, driven by its data center segment.
• NVIDIA's networking revenues nearly tripled YoY to $14.8 billion, while Marvell expects its interconnect business to grow over 70% in FY27.
• Both companies are benefiting from massive AI spending, with NVIDIA's gross margin improving to 75% and Marvell projecting FY27 revenue growth of approximately 40%.
news.Keywords: AI Semiconductors, Data Center, Networking, Revenue Growth, Market Leadership

news.Title: Stock Indexes Rally to Record Highs on Peace Deal Hopes and AI Spending
news.Content: The S&P 500 Index ($SPX) (SPY) today is up +0.41%, the Dow Jones Industrial Average ($DOWI) (DIA) is up +0.43%, and the Nasdaq 100 Index ($IUXX) (QQQ) is up +0.66%. June E-mini S&P futures (ESM26) are up +0.37%, and June E-mini Nasdaq futures (NQM26) are up +0.66%. Stock indexes are moving higher today, with the S&P 500, Dow Jones Industrials, and the Nasdaq 100 climbing to new all-time highs. Stocks are supported by prospects for a peace deal in the Middle East, which are easing pressure on crude oil prices and reducing inflation concerns. Also, evidence of relentless demand for ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Major stock indexes, including the S&P 500, Dow Jones, and Nasdaq 100, reached new all-time highs, driven by peace deal hopes and strong AI spending.

news.AI_Summary:

• The company faces intensifying competition from players like Cerebras Systems and traditional CPU leaders such as AMD in the evolving AI landscape.

news.Title: S&P Futures Gain on Hopes for U.S.-Iran Deal; Dell Pops on Blowout Earnings
news.Content: June S&P 500 E-Mini futures (ESM26) are trending up +0.18% this morning as investors became more confident that the U.S. and Iran are nearing a deal. The U.S. and Iran have reportedly reached a tentative deal to extend the ceasefire by 60 days, which would include the reciprocal reopening of the Strait of Hormuz during the first 30 days. It would mark the first phase of a multistage framework, which the U.S. hopes will result in Iran scaling back its nuclear program for decades. “We perhaps have the makings of a deal here,” Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said on Thursday. ...
news.AI_Summary:
• S&P futures gained on hopes of a U.S.-Iran deal, potentially leading to a rise in risk assets and a fall in rates.
• Dell Technologies saw a significant pre-market pop (+37%) following strong Q1 earnings and raised full-year revenue guidance due to AI server demand.
• Arm Holdings (ARM) and Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) experienced notable stock price increases (+10% and +4% respectively).
• Economic data showed mixed signals, with moderating GDP growth and stable personal spending, while inflation remains a concern.
news.Keywords: geopolitical risk, corporate earnings, AI infrastructure, economic data, market sentiment

news.Title: 63% of the Bill Gates Foundation's Stock Portfolio Is Invested in Just 3 Large-Cap Stocks
news.Content: Bill Gates will always be best known for founding Microsoft , the tech conglomerate that created the suite of office tools that essentially power the business world today, along with many other great business lines. Microsoft is one of the largest companies in the world with a market cap of more than $3 trillion. Gates is long removed from running the company's operations, but after stepping down as CEO in 2000, Gates and his ex-wife Melinda formed the Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation, which now goes by the Gates Foundation. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation Trust's endowment, managed separately from its philanthropic activities, held over $31.6 billion in assets at Q1 end.
• 63% of the foundation's Q1 portfolio was concentrated in three large-cap stocks: Berkshire Hathaway (26%), Waste Management (20%), and Microsoft (implied).
• Berkshire Hathaway is highlighted for its diversification across insurance, energy, railroad, and a substantial stock portfolio.
• Waste Management is noted for its transition into renewable energy and healthcare solutions, including AI-powered robotics.
news.Keywords: portfolio allocation, large-cap stocks, endowment management, diversification, philanthropic assets

news.Title: VYM vs. SCHD: Which U.S. Dividend ETF Is a Better Buy?
news.Content: When people decide to buy dividend stocks, they're usually looking for safety. That doesn't mean these stocks are "safe," because no stocks are. All stocks carry a risk of loss. But investing in high-yield dividend stocks often means buying into high-quality companies with strong balance sheets. Dividend exchange-traded funds (ETFs) might not be flashy like tech stocks, but people don't buy dividend ETFs expecting rapid growth. Instead, investing in these funds is a matter of "slow and steady wins the race." This type ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The article compares two U.S. dividend ETFs, Vanguard High Dividend Yield ETF (VYM) and Schwab U.S. Dividend Equity ETF (SCHD), for investors seeking safety and steady income.
• Both ETFs have underperformed the S&P 500 over the past five years but are outperforming year-to-date in 2026.
• VYM holds over 600 stocks with a 2.24% dividend yield and has delivered a 29.5% return in the past year.
• SCHD holds 103 stocks with a 3.29% dividend yield and has outperformed the S&P 500 year-to-date.
• The ETFs offer diversification away from major tech names, though VYM includes Broadcom, a significant AI stock.
news.Keywords: dividend ETFs, income investing, portfolio diversification, market volatility, yield

news.Title: Jobs report on tap for soaring US stocks as rate path, bond yields eyed as risks
news.Content: By Lewis Krauskopf NEW YORK, May 29 (Reuters) - Investors will turn to an important labor market update next week as they weigh whether simmering inflation and the potential for interest rate hikes could derail the rally in U.S. stocks. Broadcom's results also pose a test in the coming week for the ‌red-hot AI trade. This week, U.S. equity indexes continued their charge higher, with the benchmark S&P 500 up more than 10% on the ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Investors are closely watching the upcoming jobs report and inflation data for potential impacts on interest rate policy and the stock market rally.
• Broadcom's upcoming earnings report is a key test for the 'red-hot AI trade', with semiconductor shares having surged significantly.
• Persistent high inflation and the possibility of Fed rate hikes are growing concerns for equity markets.
• The PCE Price Index rose 3.8% year-over-year in April, indicating inflationary pressures.
• Semiconductor stocks, including Broadcom, have seen substantial gains driven by optimism around AI infrastructure buildout.
news.Keywords: labor market data, inflation, interest rate policy, AI trade, semiconductor sector

news.Title: Tesla Stock Could Soar in the Second Half of 2026. Here's Why.
news.Content: Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) has not performed well this year. The stock is down 1% as of writing, while the S&P 500 has climbed 10%. Although Tesla's first-quarter results released on April 22 were pretty good on the surface -- revenue jumped 16% year over year to $22.4 billion, even amid the electric vehicle (EV) industry losing ground in the U.S. -- investors are concerned about Tesla's runaway spending. The company now projects capex spending for 2026 to be over $25 billion, above its previous guidance of $20 billion. There is skepticism regarding whether Tesla can justify these investments, especially given ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Tesla's stock has underperformed the S&P 500 year-to-date, despite a 16% revenue jump in Q1 to $22.4 billion.
• Investors are concerned about Tesla's increased capex spending projection of over $25 billion for 2026.
• The company's Optimus Gen 3 humanoid robot reveal, expected around late July/August, could be a significant catalyst if successful.
• Progress in Tesla's robotaxi service expansion and the development of unsupervised Full Self-Driving (FSD) software are also key potential drivers.
• Despite high valuation multiples (208x forward earnings), Tesla possesses significant long-term growth potential if execution is strong.
news.Keywords: capex spending, humanoid robots, robotaxi, autonomous driving, valuation multiples

news.Title: GOP lawmakers' portfolios are migrating to Trump favorites like Intel and bitcoin
news.Content: Republican lawmakers’ brokerage accounts have undergone a significant shift as GOP members of Congress load up on investments into areas touted by President Trump — in particular Intel ( INTC ) and bitcoin ( BTC-USD ). Lawmaker trading on both sides of the aisle remains controversial, but a longstanding portfolio divide along party lines is clearly evolving. More from Yahoo Scout What role does Trump play in Republican trading? How do Democratic and Republican portfolio performances compare? How have Republican lawmakers' investment strategies shifted recently? Why are GOP members investing heavily in Intel? Democrats’ investments have traditionally been tech-heavy in ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Republican lawmakers' investment portfolios show a significant shift towards tech stocks, particularly Intel, and Bitcoin, aligning with President Trump's favored areas.
• This shift contrasts with historical GOP portfolios dominated by traditional sectors and reflects a divergence from Democratic lawmakers' tech-heavy strategies.
• Intel has seen substantial trading activity from lawmakers, fueled partly by the government's stake and Trump's endorsements.
• The Republican ETF tracking lawmaker portfolios has outperformed the market year-to-date, driven by holdings like Intel and Nvidia.
• Investments in Bitcoin ETFs have also increased among GOP lawmakers, mirroring Trump's support for the cryptocurrency sector.
news.Keywords: political influence, sector rotation, semiconductor investment, cryptocurrency, lawmaker trading

news.Title: 2 Monster EV Stocks Chasing a $10 Trillion AI Opportunity
news.Content: Don't confuse electric vehicle (EV) stocks with traditional automotive stocks . In my view, most conventional auto stocks are akin to most manufacturing businesses. That means high capital expenditures (capex), exposure to shifting consumer trends, and growth rates that mirror the transportation industry overall. EV businesses are something else entirely. Companies that specialize in them must build their vehicles to sell to consumers, ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The article identifies two Electric Vehicle (EV) stocks, Tesla and Rivian Automotive, positioned to capitalize on the estimated $8-$10 trillion robotaxi market opportunity.
• Tesla is highlighted for its aggressive pursuit of full self-driving capabilities, investment in xAI, and ongoing Cybercab production.
• Rivian is presented as a potentially more attractive investment due to its lower valuation ($20 billion) and strategic positioning as a supplier to robotaxi services.
• Rivian is increasing investments in AI and self-driving, impacting its near-term profitability targets but positioning it for future growth.
• The robotaxi market is expected to scale significantly starting around 2030, with L4 autonomy being a key enabler.
news.Keywords: robotaxi market, autonomous vehicles, EV stocks, AI investment, market opportunity

news.Title: 5 Warren Buffett Stocks to Hold Forever
news.Content: Warren Buffett is no longer the CEO of his investment vehicle, Berkshire Hathaway (NYSE: BRKA) (NYSE: BRKB) , but the celebrated investor is leaving a long shadow. In fact, many of the company's stock positions in its equity portfolio were opened during his long tenure as its leader. New(ish) CEO Greg Abel has already left his mark on the company as its chief, but the portfolio is still anchored by Buffett -era picks. Of this clutch of stocks, five stand out as investments to own for a lifetime -- American Express (NYSE: AXP) , Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOG) (NASDAQ: GOOGL) , ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Warren Buffett's investment vehicle, Berkshire Hathaway, continues to hold significant stakes in long-term growth stocks like Alphabet and Apple.
• Alphabet's revenue has grown from under $258 billion to nearly $403 billion in five years, with net income at $132 billion last year, driven by search, AI, and cloud.
• Apple's services ecosystem and popular high-end products, including the iPhone, continue to drive revenue growth, with its stake in Apple being Berkshire's largest position at over $70 billion.
news.Keywords: long-term investment, value investing, portfolio holdings, revenue growth, AI technology

news.Title: Analysis-In China, AMD CEO Lisa Su is understated while Nvidia's Huang is more razzmatazz
news.Content: By Eduardo Baptista and Liam Mo BEIJING, May 29 (Reuters) - When AMD CEO Lisa Su arrived in China last week just days after Nvidia 's CEO left, she kept a much lower profile than Jensen Huang, who drew crowds in the centre of the capital as he posed for photos and ate local ‌delicacies like Beijing-style soybean paste noodles. Their contrasting approaches show two very different forms of corporate diplomacy around the world's ...
news.AI_Summary:
• AMD CEO Lisa Su adopted a low-profile approach in China compared to Nvidia's Jensen Huang, reflecting diverging strategies in the sensitive AI chip market.
• Nvidia's market share in China has fallen to near zero due to U.S. export controls, while AMD holds 4% and offers a broader range of products beyond AI accelerators.
• AMD's China revenue accounts for about 20% of its total, and the company is promoting its ROCm software stack to Chinese developers as an alternative to Nvidia's CUDA.
news.Keywords: geopolitical risk, market share, export controls, AI chips, corporate diplomacy

news.Title: 「兆元宴」太補！台股1.81兆新天量吃到飽  鴻海領電子五哥亮燈鋪紅地毯｜Yahoo財經掃描
news.Content:
市場謠傳美國、伊朗已達成將停火行動展延60天的草擬協議，加上雲端軟體及資料倉儲服務商Snowflake Inc.因財測優於預期、擴大與AWS合作而暴漲，帶動軟體股人氣升溫，投資人也持續消化關鍵通膨數據與關稅進度，美股四大指數全面收漲，其中道瓊、那指與標普500指數同步改寫歷史收盤新高。科技股方面，Snowflake暴漲帶動軟體族群走強，AI與半導體題材延續熱度，台積電ADR也上漲0.5%、收424.86美元，再寫收盤新天價。

亞股方面，日股強漲2.53%，韓股上漲3.55%，齊噴歷史新高；港股上漲0.66%，上證指數則是下跌0.73%，主要亞股在美股創高激勵下多數走揚。

回到台股，台股今(29)日在美股創高、台積電ADR續寫天價，以及黃仁勳「兆元宴」帶旺，老AI族群集體發功帶動下強勢反攻，終場大漲1096.50點、漲幅2.51%，收44,732.94點，再創歷史收盤新高，盤中最高觸及44,933.95點，周線、月線同步收紅，成交金額放大至1兆8199.47億元，連續三天寫下歷史天量。權王 台積電(2330) 受ADR創高與AI需求題材激勵，股價續強並改寫天價，成為推升大盤攻高的重要火車頭。盤面表現方面，電子指數上漲74.74點、金融指數上漲31.24點，權值電子與金融同步助攻；老AI股全面點火， 廣達(2382) 、 緯創(3231) 、 英業達(2356) 、 仁寶(2324) 等電子五哥成盤面焦點， 鴻海(2317) 也亮燈漲停，全面帶動AI供應鏈人氣回籠。另「鴻家軍」題材同步發酵， 森崴能源(6806) 由跌停拉至漲停，引發市場熱議，成為盤面另一大話題。

📝盤點熱門股：群創、力積電、仁寶

今日熱門成交榜前五名全數收紅，成交王由面板股 群創(3481) 奪下，盤中一度亮燈打開後又鎖漲停，加上近期市場資金聚焦面板報價、低價轉機與題材輪動，買盤追價熱絡；同族群 友達(2409) 價量齊揚，擠進前四，反映面板股人氣延續，族群買氣升溫。

記憶體族群方面，力積電(6770)再度強勢走揚，受惠記憶體行情持續升溫，股價連7漲並改寫新天價，帶動成交金額衝高，成為盤面資金追逐焦點。電子代工股仁寶(2324)也表現強勢，搭上黃仁勳「兆元宴」光環與AI供應鏈題材，推升買賣熱度。

ETF方面，主動統一升級50(00403A)熱度不退，股價走揚並擠進成交榜前五，網友熱議「快下來我要補票」，顯示市場追捧人氣續高。

👥台股五月風雲榜：

台股5月資金湧，題材多，盤面強弱分歧擴大。強勢股由被動元件領軍， 國巨*(2327) 創新高帶動「被動元件七雄」齊漲， 禾伸堂(3026) 單月飆逾200%稱王；上櫃股則由 尚茂(8291) 連拉24根漲停、單月大漲逾4倍最吸睛。不過跌幅榜同樣慘烈， 森崴能源(6806) ...... 點我看更多

🔭重大財經事件展望

下周一(1日)國際財經焦點，先看美國市場，將公布5月ISM製造業PMI與5月製造業PMI終值，，科技展會方面，輝達NVIDIA GTC Taipei 2026、思科Cisco Live與Snowflake技術大會同步登場；歐洲方面，歐元區、德國與法國將公布5月製造業PMI終值；亞太區方面，日本與韓國將公布5月製造業PMI終值，韓國也將公布5月出口；陸港澳方面，大陸將公布5月RatingDog製造業PMI，香港將公布5月外匯存底，美團也將公布第一季財報，加上618年中大促正式開打，阿里巴巴、京東、拼多多、美團等電商平台參戰，消費買氣、平台補貼力道與內需修復情況將成市場焦點，另多家新能源車公司將公布5月銷售數據，港股與A股企業也進入年報後股東大會密集期。

台灣方面，國內焦點包括中經院發布5月台灣採購經理人指數，以及COMPUTEX全球記者會，市場將關注製造業景氣回溫力道、AI供應鏈展望與國際科技大廠來台布局；企業動態方面，股東會可留意 皇翔(2545) 、 中菲行(5609) 、 鳳凰(5706) 、 生華科(6492) 等，法說會則聚焦 聚陽(1477) 、 東元(1504) 、 亞德客-KY(1590) 、 川湖(2059) 、 光寶科(2301) 、 仁寶(2324) 、 國巨*(2327) 、 宏碁(2353) 、 廣達(2382) 、 景碩(3189) 、 緯創(3231) 、 雙鴻(3324) 、 創意(3443) 、 樺漢(6414) 、 精測(6510) 、 M31(6643) 、 富世達(6805) 、 群聯(8299) 等大廠，將牽動盤面資金輪動。

news.Title: 《陸股》滬指跌0.73%、月K翻黑；恆指5日線承壓
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-05-29 16:51:29 新聞中心 發佈

中國股匯今(29)日走勢不同調，人民幣兌美元中間價再創逾三年新高，在岸及離岸價盤中亦雙雙升破6.77；滬深兩市則開高走跌，盤面上，大消費類股、電力、金融股走強，晶片產業鏈則集體大跌，半導體、玻璃基板、先進封裝等明顯回檔。滬指午後跌幅一度擴至逾1%，深成指、創業板跌逾2%，科創50大跌逾5%。滬指尾盤回測季線有撐，終場收跌0.73%，日K翻黑；本週跌1.08%、週K連三黑；本月跌1.06%、月K翻黑。

上證指數今收於4068.57點、跌0.73%；深證成指收於15575.13點、跌1.81%；創業板指收於4037.95點、跌2.11%；科創50收於1751.32點、跌5.04%；中證A500收於6100.14點、跌1.13%。

以週線來看，上證指數本週跌1.08%、週K連三黑；深證成指跌0.14%，創業板指漲2.53%。以月線觀察，上證指數本月跌1.06%、月K翻黑；深證成指漲3.1%，創業板指漲9.81%。

成交量方面，滬市今成交1兆5,321億元(人民幣,下同)，深市成交1兆7,870億元，兩市成交額達3兆3,191億元，較前一交易日量增約12%。

從盤面上來看，零售、白酒、創新藥等逆勢走強，貴州茅台漲近4%；玻璃基板、AI手機、先進封裝、氮化鎵、光刻機、AI晶片等則見跌幅明顯。受中國大基金減持影響，中芯國際A股跌近9%，滬硅產業、德邦科技均跌逾9%。其餘個股方面，華大九天跌逾一成，海光信息跌逾6%，寒武紀跌逾5%。

港股方面，香港恆生指數今日開高逾百點後，升幅一度收斂至49點，之後在科網股拉升下，漲幅一度擴至逾1.2%；盤面上，恆生科技指數跌0.09%，中芯國際H股跌逾7%，華虹半導體跌逾5%，騰訊、百度等則走揚。恆指午後維持在5日線下方震盪，終場收於25182.39點、漲0.7%，本週則跌1.65%、週K連三黑；本月跌2.3%、月K翻黑。

《陸股》滬指重回4100點、漲0.87%；恆指漲0.86%

news.Title: 台股零股交易大改革！　林修銘喊最快年底與大盤交易同步
news.Content:
【緯來新聞網】AI掀起台股投資熱潮，28日零股交易金額飆出807.78億元新高。然而零股交易長期受限於開盤時間落差、無法當沖等問題，投資人怨聲載道。但台灣證交所董事長 林修銘 近日表示，零股交易將迎來重大變革，最快年底前零股交易時間將與大盤同步，直接從上午9時開始撮合，提升交易效率。

台灣證交所董事長林修銘近日表示，最快年底前零股交易時間將與大盤同步，直接從上午9時開始撮合（圖／達志影像）

現行台股零股交易制度中，零股需待開盤10分鐘後、也就是上午9時10分才進行首次撮合，與整股市場於9時同步開盤的機制不同，證交所正積極調整交易機制，除了同步開盤外，也在評估調整撮合頻率，希望能與各大券商合作推動此項改革。此外，林修銘也表示台股集中市場的交易時間是有可能延長的，但因涉及系統和配套調整，這項改變推動時間較長，仍需進一步規劃。整體來看，零股交易制度的優化將有助於提升台股市場的流動性和投資便利性，對小資族來說是重大利多。

news.Title: 《韓股》KOSPI指數漲3.55%，創收盤新高
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-05-29 16:42:46 數位內容中心 發佈

韓股今(29)日盤勢呈現明顯分歧，韓國KOSPI指數收於8,476.15點，上漲290.86點或3.55%，創收盤歷史新高；韓國KOSDAQ指數收於1,074.80點，下跌29.56點或2.68%。韓國KOSPI指數走高，主要受惠於市場傳出美國與伊朗已達成暫定協議、可望延長停火60天，加上美股主要指數再創新高，帶動市場風險偏好升溫，並提振對AI與半導體相關類股的投資情緒。

半導體與大型科技股為推升今日韓國KOSPI指數創高的核心動能。市場聚焦Samsung Electronics(005930.KS)的HBM4E樣品出貨消息，進一步帶動Samsung Electronics漲5.84%、SK Hynix(000660.KS)漲1.92%、Samsung Electro-Mechanics(009150.KS)漲15.04%，並成為推升指數上漲的主力。

整體市場呈現漲勢集中的格局，韓國KOSPI指數上漲個股約200餘檔、下跌約688檔；韓國KOSDAQ指數上漲約313檔、下跌約1,393檔，反映大盤漲幅主要來自少數大型權值股。今日成交金額與交易熱度集中在權值股與相關槓桿商品，使小型股與創新型成分股相對承壓，拖累KOSDAQ指數收黑。

《韓股》半導體帶動，KOSPI漲逾2%續創收盤新高

news.Title: 華為驚爆「韜定律」直攻1.4奈米！黃仁勳揭台積電最強護城河：早領先10年
news.Content:
大陸科技巨頭華為日前正式發表「韜（τ）定律」，並計畫在在2031年設計出等效1.4奈米的高端晶片，引發全球市場高度關注，甚至被視為可能挑戰台積電先進製程地位。對此，輝達（NVIDIA）執行長黃仁勳昨（28）日公開回應，稱讚這對華為來說是一項很好的突破，但強調「對台積電不是威脅」，因為台積電與台灣在相關領域早已領先超過10年。

華為半導體業務部總裁何庭波於5月26日在2026國際電路與系統研討會上，正式公布以「邏輯折疊」為技術核心的「韜（τ）定律」，並發表論文《多層電子系統的時間縮微理論》。何庭波指出，過去依賴製程微縮的摩爾定律已逼近物理極限，而韜定律則是藉由減少等待、傳輸、同步和計算的時間，繞過製程限制繼續發展。

華為預計在今年秋季發表首款完整採用邏輯折疊技術、代號為「麒麟2026」的手機晶片，市場報導推論其效能或已達到台積電等效3奈米製程；華為更預期在2031年，高階晶片的電晶體密度將達到等同於1.4奈米製程水準。此舉被外界視為大陸在美國制裁與EUV光刻機設備受限下，試圖挑戰台積電先進製程地位的新路線。

輝達執行長黃仁勳昨日出席與台灣科技供應鏈大老闆齊聚的「兆元宴」餐敘，並在餐後首度針對華為「韜定律」作出回應。黃仁勳表示，華為藉由3D封裝、晶粒堆疊（Die Stacking）以及混合鍵合（Hybrid Bonding）等先進技術，即便不縮減半導體製程線寬，也能將電晶體密度拉升2倍、3倍甚至4倍，「這是一項相當出色的技術，也是華為的重要突破。」

不過，黃仁勳也強調，台積電其實早在近10年前就已深耕CoWoS、SoIC等先進封裝領域，「台積電的技術非常先進，台灣早就擁有這項技術。」他認為，華為的新方向反映了其在禁令下的突圍手段，但還不足以威脅台積電的領先地位。

除了談及科技競爭，黃仁勳也再次對台灣的能源供應提出示警。他指出，未來不只是晶圓廠、封裝廠與電腦工廠需要大量用電，台灣因應AI時代還需要建立更多AI資料中心，因此勢必需要更多能源支撐。

news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-05-29 16:32:31 數位內容中心 發佈

日股今(29)日漲勢強勁，日經225指數收於66,329.50點，上漲1636.38點或2.53%；東證股價指數(TOPIX)收於3,957.17點，上漲55.16點或1.41%。日股在地緣政治緩和、科技題材帶動下同步走揚，日經225指數盤中最高觸及66505.02點，整體市場情緒明顯由避險轉向風險性資產，推升成交熱度並驅動指數創新高。

宏觀與外部因素方面，今日買盤主要受到市場傳出美國與伊朗有望延長停火60天的消息激勵，避險需求下降、使日股承接美股走勢強勢開出。另外，美國企業財報顯示，半導體相關需求延續，市場將此視為對日本半導體供應鏈的正面訊號，在兩大利多交互作用下，資金明顯回流風險性資產，投資人對科技與半導體產業前景的能見度進一步提升，並反映在整體指數的上漲動能上。

權值股與類股表現部分，AI與半導體題材成為今日推升大盤的主要動能，科技與半導體相關類股走強，市場資金明顯集中於高階電子元件與半導體製程供應鏈；權值股方面，由SoftBank Group (9984.JP)領漲、收漲5.14%，整體權值股表現與科技題材同步，帶動TOPIX與日經225指數走高，成交熱度亦明顯升溫。

《日股》震盪拉回，日經收跌0.47%

《歐股》科技股強勢噴發 歐股創逾1個月新高

資料來源- MoneyDJ理財網

news.Title: Treasury Yields Are Soaring -- and That's Not a Coincidence With Kevin Warsh Now Leading the Federal Reserve
news.Content: On the surface, the stock market appears untouchable. In recent weeks, the time-tested Dow Jones Industrial Average (DJINDICES: ^DJI) , broad-based S&P 500 (SNPINDEX: ^GSPC) , and tech-fueled Nasdaq Composite (NASDAQINDEX: ^IXIC) all closed at record highs. But do a bit of digging into U.S. Treasury bond yields, and you'll discover that Wall Street's historic rally ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Treasury yields are soaring, with the 10-year yield nearing its 2023 high and the 30-year yield hitting a 19-year high, which is detrimental to the stock market.
• New Fed Chair Kevin Warsh's hawkish monetary approach and plans to reduce the Fed's balance sheet are contributing to higher interest rates.
• Reducing the Fed's balance sheet by selling long-term Treasury bonds would decrease bond prices, increase yields, and make borrowing more expensive, potentially halting the AI-driven stock rally.
news.Keywords: Treasury yields, monetary policy, Federal Reserve, interest rates, balance sheet reduction

news.Title: 《台股盤後》天量飆漲1096點、寫新高；月K連二紅
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-05-29 16:25:15 新聞中心 發佈

台股今(29)日在兆元宴加持下，鴻海、廣達、緯穎、宏碁齊飆漲停，加上由於盤後MSCI季度成份股調整生效、台積電權重獲上調最多下，激勵其飆出新天價、收漲2.6%，搭配中信金首度站上60元、台塑四寶擁轉型題材下呈強勢表現，且19大類股無一收黑，加權指數終場收在44732.94點，大漲1096.50點或2.51%，刷新收盤新高，成交量顯升至1兆8164.50億元；週K連二紅、本週上漲2464.97點或5.83%；月K連二紅、本月上漲5806.31點或14.92%。

美國、伊朗傳已達成將停火行動展延60天的草擬協議，帶動道瓊工業平均指數、那斯達克指數、標準普爾500指數再創新高，費半指數也由ARM大漲近11%激勵下，收漲1%，消化掉上日美股電子盤跌勢的陰霾。亞洲股市方面，ARM加持軟銀反彈5.1%，輔以內需權值股FAST RETAILING上漲5%，且東證所類股幾乎全面上漲下，帶動日經225指數收漲2.53%；韓國KOSPI指數則收漲3.55%。

電子股今日在兆元宴加持下，台積電上漲2.61%，鴻海、廣達、緯穎、宏碁更齊飆漲停，雖聯發科、日月光投控逆勢下跌，惟光電股回神，彩晶/群創雙雙亮燈漲停、友達也勁揚逾8%，同時記憶體族群再獲資金點火上攻，華邦電鎖漲停、南亞科漲7%、宜鼎漲6%、群聯漲5%，加上衛星題材的昇達科漲停，整體多頭信心已明顯回籠。

以29大類股來看，塑膠股上漲7.23%、漲勢居冠，主要是南亞股東會釋出正向看法大漲8.4%的激勵效應；電腦及週邊類股在宏碁、緯穎等漲停帶動下，上漲6.7%、漲幅居次；電器電纜族群則受智慧電網與基礎建設題材所帶動，收漲5.64%、漲幅居第三。而電子通路類股表現最為疲弱、小跌0.37%，為29大類股中唯一下跌族群，主要係權重股大聯大跌3.3%、文曄跌0.3%的拖累效應。

三大法人動向方面，今日三大法人合計買超1018.79億元；其中，自營商買超154.27億元，投信買超60.97億元，外資及陸資買超803.56億元。

《DJ Insight》搶食2500億美元新藍海！量子運算走出實驗室，靠實戰應用迎來商業化

達擎將展電子紙解決方案，友達轉型效益發酵

資料來源- MoneyDJ理財網

news.Title: 跟天氣一樣熱！台股爆1.8兆元歷史天量 財政部證交稅「日進45億元」
news.Content:
5月台股跟天氣一樣熱爆了！《Yahoo股市》統計，台股加權指數5月大漲5806.31點，成交量天天破兆元、續創歷史新高。若以今（29）日成交金額達1.87兆元估算，並假設當沖成交占比約4成、非當沖交易占比約6成，財政部光是一天證交稅就可望入帳近45億元。

台股今日開高走高，加權指數終場大漲1096.5點，以44732.94點作收，改寫收盤新高，同步創下1.87兆元成交天量。

台股目前一般的證券交易稅率為千分之3，而現股當日沖銷（當沖）交易的稅率則減半課徵至千分之1.5。若以近期台股整體當沖成交金額占大盤總成交金額約為4成、非當沖（一般波段交易與長期投資）比例約為6成計算，並分別適用不同的證交稅率計算，單日證交稅收粗估可達約44.88億元。

進一步統計台股5月整體成交金額高達近26.29兆元，日均成交值約達1兆3145億元，推估財政部單月可望進帳約630.96億元證交稅，有望再度改寫歷史新高紀錄。

回顧4月證交稅收情形，單月實徵546億元，年增368億元、年增幅高達2.1倍，不僅創歷年單月新高，也是自民國99年2月以來最大增幅，並已連續九個月維持正成長。財政部統計處副處長劉訓蓉先前就表示，預期5月、6月的稅收趨勢將持續攀升，今年證交稅預算要達成目標「非常樂觀」。

馮萱榕／財經特派記者，主跑財政部、電腦通路、觀光餐飲等

news.Title: 台積電攜供應商再生電子級二氧化碳　年減碳1200公噸
news.Content: （中央社記者張建中新竹2026年05月29日電）晶圓代工廠台積電 (2330) 與雙氧水供應商合作，針對生產過程 ...
news.AI_Summary:

• 此項再生二氧化碳已成功導入晶圓14B廠，預計每年可減少約1200公噸的碳排放。
• 此舉旨在提升供應鏈永續性並實踐循環經濟，符合ESG（環境、社會責任、公司治理）目標。
• 台積電提供技術支援，協助供應商確保再生二氧化碳符合半導體製程的高純度標準。
news.Keywords: 永續發展,循環經濟,碳捕捉,ESG,供應鏈管理

• 他建議採取「災難投資法」，在股價大跌時買進相對安全。

The portfolio spans solid-state drives (SSDs), embedded products, removable cards, USB drives, and wafers and ...
news.AI_Summary:

news.Title: At Computex, Nvidia and Taiwan's expanding role in AI infrastructure set to take centre stage
news.Content: By Wen-Yee Lee TAIPEI, May 29 (Reuters) - At Taiwan's annual Computex trade show next week, the spotlight is likely to be dominated, as usual, by Nvidia and its products, but also by the island's central and growing role in AI infrastructure. Nvidia CEO Jensen ‌Huang, arriving in Taipei more than a week ahead of the show, more than made that ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia and Taiwan's role in AI infrastructure are set to be central themes at the upcoming Computex trade show.
• Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang announced plans for the company to spend up to $150 billion annually in Taiwan, calling it the 'epicenter of the AI revolution'.
• AMD CEO Lisa Su also committed to investing over $10 billion in Taiwan's AI sector, co-investing with local partners for 2026 expansion.
• Taiwan's AI ecosystem is expanding from semiconductor manufacturing to broader infrastructure, including server manufacturers, packaging, and component suppliers.
• Nvidia's keynote will likely focus on data center products like the Vera Rubin platform and its efforts in robotics and AI manufacturing.
news.Keywords: AI infrastructure, Computex, supply chain, data center, manufacturing ecosystem

news.Title: 71.6% of Nvidia's Portfolio Is Invested in These 2 Top Artificial Intelligence (AI) Stocks
news.Content: Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) is at the center of the artificial intelligence (AI) revolution, and the company is trying to secure its future in the industry. One way it is doing so is through heavy R&D investments. Another is by investing in other promising AI-focused companies. Two of them, Intel (NASDAQ: INTC) and CoreWeave (NASDAQ: CRWV) , accounted for about 71.6% of its portfolio as of March 31. Given that Nvidia ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia (NVDA) has invested significantly in Intel (INTC) and CoreWeave (CRWV), representing 71.6% of its portfolio as of March 31.
• Intel is highlighted for its role in the server CPU market for agentic AI, with revenue up 7% YoY to $13.6 billion and adjusted EPS soaring 123% to $0.29 in Q1.
• Despite strong EPS growth, Intel's stock has risen nearly 500% in 12 months and trades at a high forward P/E of 151.5x, suggesting it may be overvalued.
• CoreWeave, an AI infrastructure provider, reported Q1 revenue of $2.1 billion, up 111.6% YoY, with a backlog of $99.4 billion.
• CoreWeave is not yet profitable, with operating expenses growing faster than revenue, leading to squeezed margins and net losses, despite significant revenue growth.
news.Keywords: AI investment, CPU market, agentic AI, infrastructure provider, valuation concerns

news.Title: 台股財富效果發酵，5月房市回溫，全台房市交易月增12%、年增23%
news.Content: 【財訊快報／記者張家瑋報導】受惠於AI相關產業需求強勁、出口暢旺，景氣燈號連4紅，台股也迭創新高，資本市場氣氛熱絡，加上中東戰事衝擊 ...

• 永慶房屋統計顯示，主要都會區如台北、新北、桃園、新竹、台中、台南及高雄的房市交易量均有月增及年增表現。
• 陳金萍表示，經濟穩定成長、出口暢旺、台股創新高帶動財富效果外溢，剛性需求買盤回穩是主要原因。
• 然而，利率短期內無下調空間及信用管制仍是制約房市的關鍵因素，市場以自用需求為主力，價量趨於穩定。
news.Keywords: 房地產,財富效果,交易量,剛性需求,信用管制

news.Title: Ark Investment's Cathie Wood Just Trimmed Her AMD Stake to Add This Inference Stock. Should Investors Follow Suit?
news.Content: Ark Investment's Cathie Wood has become one of the best-known tech investors, as her Ark Innovation ETF (NYSEMKT: ARKK) has put up some eye-popping returns in the past. Wood likes to make bold bets on future innovation, and as a result, her flagship exchange-traded fund (ETF) has been quite volatile over the years, with some big up and big down years. Recently, Wood was trimming her stake in Advanced Micro ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Cathie Wood's Ark Innovation ETF reduced its stake in AMD, but AMD remains its second-largest holding, suggesting profit-taking rather than a loss of confidence.
• AMD is well-positioned for the inference market with its ROCm software and chiplet design, and has secured two large GPU commitments.
• The company is also a leader in the data center CPU market, which is expected to see explosive growth due to agentic AI.
• AMD estimates the data center CPU market opportunity at $120 billion, while Nvidia estimates it at $200 billion.
news.Keywords: AI inference, data center CPUs, GPU commitments, agentic AI, profit-taking

Starlink is leading revenue SpaceX ...
news.AI_Summary:
• SpaceX's investor prospectus reveals details ahead of its upcoming IPO, including revenue streams from rocket launches, Starlink, and xAI.
• SpaceX reported revenue of $4.1 billion (rocket), $11.4 billion (Starlink), and $3.2 billion (xAI) in 2025.
• Starlink revenue increased 32% YoY in Q1 2026, with subscribers growing to 10.3 million, though average revenue per user declined.

• The company estimates a total addressable market (TAM) of $28 trillion, with AI representing $26.5 trillion of that figure.

news.Title: 兆元宴發威! 台股噴千點新高44732天量1.9兆
news.Content:
[ 非凡新聞 ]記者林浩宇,攝影謝隆証

輝達執行長黃仁勳宴請供應鏈夥伴的「兆元宴」效應來了，今（29）日在護國神山台積電與鴻海雙雙改寫歷史新高，輝達供應鏈概念股全面噴發，加權指數盤中大漲超過千點，重新站上44000點整數大關，終場上漲1096點，以44732點作收，成交量1兆8713億元。隨著COMPUTEX展即將登場，加上MSCI權重調整生效，市場資金可望持續湧入AI供應鏈。

輝達執行長黃仁勳與科技大老闆比讚合影，宴請供應鏈夥伴的兆元宴效應再度發威，29號台股開高走高，護國神山台積電最高來到2375元，改寫新天價，鴻海更攻上漲停板289元，權值股領軍衝鋒，加權指數盤中大漲超過千點，再度站上44000點大關，繼續挑戰45000點。

永誠投顧分析師 謝文琪：「比較屬於老AI股，應該要這樣講，伺服器組裝這一塊，這一些代工廠，今(29)天表現都非常非常好，當然還是因為說黃仁勳來台，去做一個加持，而且我們要注意到，他其實是提早四天來台，導致台股在這一兩周期間，還有包括下周，還有COMPUTEX展，我認為都會延遲這個熱度，至少在下周的上半周，台股的表現都會不錯，45000點非常非常有機會看到的。」

輝達供應鏈股全面噴發，廣達、緯穎、緯創、宏碁、英業達、華碩等盤面刷出一排紅燈；記憶體族群華邦電亮燈漲停；股王信驊股價更一度衝上19510元，再創新高；受到美國調降汽車零組件關稅激勵，東陽、麗清同步亮燈漲停；盤面上電子、金融、傳產百花齊放。

華南投顧董事長 呂仁傑：「今年在第二季來看，有機會來測試4萬7千點，那至於在今年全年目標價的話，我們目前是看5萬點。我們看在AI大的大的趨勢上面來看，我們看整個倍數增長的動能依然在持續，從原先AI單純的晶片部分，持續陸陸續續外移到，像這些被動元件、功率半導體等等的部分，AI從原先深層式AI，逐步在轉進到所謂代理型AI這一塊，所以這一塊的需求，至少在今年來看需求還是持續往上攻。」

除了黃仁勳效應，持續發酵之外，MSCI半年度權重調整，29日盤後就會生效，獲調升權重的個股，有望持續吸引資金進駐，再加上AI題材熱度延燒，COMPUTEX接棒登場，資金與題材同步加持下，可望繼續帶動台股這班多頭列車。（記者 林浩宇、謝隆証／台北報導）

news.Title: 殖利率6%以上個股僅剩2%？台股今年已漲破5成 摩根示警高股息ETF迎挑戰
news.Content:
台股今 (29) 日早盤一度站上 45000 點大關，大盤指數今年以來漲幅已達 52.21%，然而在一片喧鬧聲中，國人偏愛的高股息股票卻出現了結構性轉變。摩根資產管理發現，隨著多數股票不斷上漲，殖利率在 6% 以上的股票，目前佔大盤市值比重已下滑到不到 2%。高息個股佔大盤市值逐步減少，將使傳統高股息 ETF 經理人面臨選股範疇受限或策略被迫調整的兩難挑戰，建議投資人此時應審慎檢視手上的 ETF 配息來源，避免面臨淨值漲不動的困境。

根據統計，隨市場指數持續創高，殖利率在 4% 以上的個股佔大盤市值比重，已從去年底的 17% 收斂到目前的 12% 至 13% 之間；而殖利率在 6% 以上的股票市值佔比，更從 4% Comma 驟降至約 2%。這種改變對於訴求在高股息策略的經理人來說，投資範疇可能將受到大幅限縮。

00401A 產品經理陳柏翰分析，近期 AI 供應鏈逐步擴散至各相關族群，帶動聯發科 (2454-TW) 與聯電 (2382-TW) 等過去被定義為高息的科技股出現明顯漲勢，若 ETF 有布局相關個股自然受惠最大。反之，若選股範圍僅側重金融、航運等傳統高股息類股，在 AI 高速增長的時代，投資表現就相對落後。

陳柏翰指出，當前的市場行情更凸顯了主動選股的重要性，在收益來源的挑選上必須更加多元化。若能額外透過掩護性買權創造權利金收入，不僅能為收益增添多元化管道，在大盤震盪時亦能發揮保底功能，讓投資可以走得更久。

陳柏翰進一步補充，有了權利金收入當底氣，正逢大盤上漲時，也能讓經理人跳脫傳統高股息股票的選股框架，把眼光放到更多成長股上。透過將資產配置於具備高成長潛力的企業，更有機會為 ETF 創造資本利得空間，追求股息與資本利得的雙贏。

表：高股息股票佔台股市值變化

news.Title: 〈聯發科展望〉A14測試片預計今年中完成 也提供英特爾EMIB封裝解決方案
news.Content:
IC 設計大廠聯發科 (2454-TW) 今 (29) 日舉行 COMPUTEX 展前交流會，資深副總經理暨數據中心與運算事業群總經理 Vince Hu 表示，聯發科長期與台積電 (2330-TW)(TSM-US) 緊密合作，不僅是首波採用台積電 2 奈米製程的業者，A14 測試片 (Test Chip) 也預計在今年中回來，同時也與英特爾 (INTC-US) 建立合作關係，成為少數同時支援 CoWoS 與 EMIB 等不同封裝方案的 ASIC 供應商。

Vince Hu 指出，先進製程是資料中心與 AI 加速器發展的關鍵能力之一，聯發科長期與台積電合作，並始終是最早採用先進製程技術的公司之一。去年聯發科已率先完成 2 奈米測試片，也是首波採用的業者之一，今年也持續在最新製程節點上進行早期驗證。

聯發科目前在台積電已有超過 40 顆 6 奈米製程完成設計定案 (Tape out)，4 奈米也有超過 15 顆，3 奈米有超過 10 顆，2 奈米則大於 2 顆，凸顯聯發科與台積電雙方長期合作的緊密關係。

他表示，聯發科不只採用先進製程，更具備 DTCO (Design Technology Co-Optimization，設計技術協同最佳化) 能力，可將過往量產經驗轉化為客戶可直接使用的客製化設計資料庫，協助客戶提升 10% 至 15% 的面積效率或降低功耗。隨著 AI 訓練與推論對運算效能、功耗與成本要求持續提高，先進製程搭配 DTCO 將成為聯發科爭取大型資料中心客戶的重要競爭優勢。

資料中心解決方案是聯發科三大新事業中成長最快的業務。Vince Hu 表示，聯發科目標成為全球頂尖的客製化晶片與標準化晶片供應商，並已在最近一次法說會中上調今年資料中心業務營收展望，預估全年營收將達約 20 億美元，對公司而言是重要里程碑。

他進一步指出，全球大型雲端服務供應商持續增加資本支出，資料中心市場規模正在加速擴張，聯發科也將原先預估於 2028 年達成的 700 億至 800 億美元市場規模目標提前至 2027 年。目前公司已拿下多項大型專案，並擁有強勁的新案管線，短期內市占率目標為 10% 至 15%。

ASIC 是聯發科資料中心事業的核心。Vince Hu 表示，聯發科自 2015 年開始投入客製化 ASIC 業務，最早聚焦網通晶片，之後逐步累積複雜多晶粒系統與先進封裝能力。2020 年完成全球最大的 InFO 封裝，尺寸達 91 乘 91 毫米，近年也持續強化資料中心技術布局，並加入 NVIDIA NVLink Fusion 生態系統。

在客製化晶片領域，聯發科主要聚焦 XPU 市場，也就是 AI 訓練與推論加速器。Vince Hu 指出，XPU 架構已不只是單純整合邏輯與記憶體，而是進一步納入高速 I/O、光互連等先進技術。多年來，聯發科已建立包含 Die-to-Die 互連、Scale-up 與 Scale-out 架構、記憶體技術與高速 I/O 在內的完整技術組合，目前幾乎所有大型 XPU 專案都有參與評估，並已成為重要競爭者。

高速 SerDes 技術也是聯發科的重要優勢。Vince Hu 表示，聯發科 SerDes 團隊合作超過 12 年，從 10G 起步，陸續開發 25G、56G、112G 產品並進入量產，目前 224G SerDes 已完成開發且可量產，更高速的下一代技術也已提供給資料中心客戶。

封裝能力方面，Vince Hu 表示，聯發科與台積電建立緊密合作關係，支援 CoWoS 封裝，同時也是少數同時支援 CoWoS 與英特爾 (INTC-US) EMIB 等不同封裝方案的客製化晶片供應商，可提供客戶更高彈性。此外，公司也支援 2.5D、3D 異質整合，以及 Co-Packaged Optics 等新世代封裝技術。

他指出，聯發科具備系統級協同最佳化能力，可協助客戶在封裝、散熱、互連技術及先進製程之間取得最佳平衡，以達成效能、功耗與成本目標，這也是公司能維持較高毛利率的重要原因之一。

記憶體也是 XPU 架構中的關鍵。Vince Hu 表示，記憶體成本甚至可能占整體 BOM 的一半，同時也是耗電的重要來源。聯發科在 HBM 技術上擁有多世代經驗，目前已開始投入客製化 HBM 技術開發，並納入未來產品規畫。在推論

news.Title: 台股5月「天天量破兆」...證券股將成「明日之星」？專家搖頭：難見大行情
news.Content:
台股成交量能持續刷出天量，昨日寫下1.59兆元的歷史新高，今日更是創下1.81兆元新天量，接連7天成交量能破兆元，不禁讓人想起賺得手續費盆滿缽滿的券商，是否會是入手的好標的呢？大來國際投顧分析師謝逸文就指出，券商獲利必然增加，不過證券股難見大行情，僅能依靠合理本益比15倍來計算，尤其一旦出現空頭、成交量下滑，就會是證券股行情反轉的時候。

全民持續瘋股市，證券交易所27日公布，全體證券商4月稅後淨利366.77億元，創歷史單月新高，史上破「三字頭」，月增358.06％；累計前四月衝上849.42億元，年增468.17％。

5月成交量能更加強大，更是屢屢突破新高，繼昨日1.59兆元歷史巨量後，今日再度寫下天量，終場1.81兆元的量能創下歷史巨量，包含群益證、統一證等證券股全數紅通通。

謝逸文說明，天天破兆元的成交量能，必定會讓券商的獲利增加，因為券商的獲利核心就是來自於收取手續費以及融資利息，當然還有衍伸性商品，因此成交量越大，手續費自然也越多。

至於券商到底能不能買？謝逸文就點名沒有金控撐腰的獨立券商龍頭群益證，去年EPS為2.64元，今年董事會決議配息0.4元，配股1.31元就是利用獲利的部分增加自身資本額。

不過，謝逸文認為，雖然群益證相較去年淨利可說是翻倍式的暴增，上半年賺贏去年全年，但現在股價漲至38元，若以合理本益比15倍來計算，仍比較不容易有巨大價差產生。

謝逸文也提醒，證券股不要想說會有大行情，是可以用合理本益比追蹤，然而若是遇到空頭行情或是成交量下滑就是證券股要反轉的時刻。

許如鎧／財經特派記者，主跑經濟部、電子電信、能源等

news.Title: 台股狂飆1096.5點創收盤新高　台積電大漲60元收2355元
news.Content:
台股今天（29日）在美股帶動下強勢上攻，加權指數開高走高，終場大漲1096.5點，收在44732.94點，改寫歷史收盤新高，漲幅達2.51％，成交量高達18164.5億元。

\n

受到美股前一交易日四大指數同步收漲，台股今早大漲以179.04點開出，盤中買盤持續湧入，指數一度衝上44933.95點，最低則為43815.48點，終場收在44732.94點，市場氣氛熱絡。

權值股方面，台積電（2330）大漲60元，收在2355元，漲幅2.61％；鴻海（2317）上漲26元至289元；聯發科（2454）下跌100元，收4310元；廣達（2382）上漲30.5元至339元；長榮（2603）則小漲2元，以213元作收。

盤面漲勢最強前5個股，緯穎（6669）大漲495元，漲幅達10％；台勝科（3532）上漲29元；晟鈦（3229）上漲4.5元；宏碁（2353）上漲3.2元；麗清（3346）則上漲1.95元，漲幅皆達10%；至於跌幅前三名個股，艾姆勒（2241）下跌3.7元，跌幅9.67％；天瀚（6225）下跌2元；邁科（6831）下跌48元。（責任編輯：呂品逸）

news.Title: 〈台股盤後〉飆漲1096點爆天量1.81兆元創收盤新高 月線長紅狂漲5806點
news.Content:
台股今 (29) 日在輝達執行長黃仁勳昨 (28) 日第 5 度舉行「兆元宴」下，全台 AI 供應鏈齊聚，加上下周 Computex 即將登場， AI 權值股台積電 (2330-TW)、鴻海 (2317-TW) 及電子代工大廠領軍下，指數開高走高，終場大漲 1096.5 點或漲 2.51%，收 44,732.94 點再寫收盤新高，尾盤更因 MSCI 季度調整爆出 1.81 兆元驚天大量。今日同時收周線、月線，均連拉 2 根長紅，分別大漲 2464.97 點及 5806.31 點，

今日權值股部分，台積電開高走高，盤中再創新高價 2375 元，最後一盤雖因 MSCI 季度調整爆出 5 萬張大量摜壓，仍收漲 2.61%；今日舉行股東會的鴻海，受惠董事長劉揚偉會中釋出未來拚賺 2 股本霸氣宣示，盤中亮燈一路鎖漲停收 289 元，股價創 19 年收盤新高；台達電 (2308-TW) 漲 2.3%、廣達 (2382-TW) 和緯穎 (6669-TW) 也雙雙漲停。

另因下周 Computex 即將登場，今日也帶動 NB 組裝族群兼老 AI 題材也齊聲上揚，宏碁 (2353-TW)、華碩 (2357-TW)、英業達 (2356-TW)、緯創 (3231-TW)、技嘉 (2376-TW)、仁寶 (2324-TW) 群嗨漲停板，神達 (3706-TW) 漲 6.86%。

DRAM 族群部分受惠記憶體股再吹利多漲風，包括商丞 (8277-TW) 漲停、力積電 (6770-TW)、華邦電 (2344-TW) 漲停板，南亞科 (2408-TW) 漲 7.1%。另群聯 (8299-TW)、創見 (2451-TW) 漲逾半根停板。

被動元件部分漲價題材持續發酵，被動元件除了一線大廠強漲，低基期個股包括二線被動元件也被往上推升，蜜望實 (8043-TW) 漲停、大毅 (2478-TW) 漲 9.45%、聚鼎 (6224-TW) 漲 7.1%。

分析師表示，台股今年 4 月、5 月份表現超級強，2 個月累計漲幅就高達 13,000 點，後市還可觀察下周台北國際電腦展 (COMPUTEX) 帶來的廠商展示利多，包括今年特別設立的機器人概念展館，預期未來有機會成為台股聚焦的核心股票。

news.Title: Blackstone (BX) to Invest $5B in TPU Cloud Joint Venture with Google
news.Content: Blackstone Inc. (NYSE:BX) is one of the 12 Most Profitable Stocks to Invest In . On May 19, 2026, Blackstone Inc. (NYSE:BX) announced a joint venture with Google to create a new U.S.-based company offering data center capacity, operations, networking, and Google Cloud’s tensor processing units, or TPUs, as ...

news.Title: Best 3 Blue Chip Stocks to Buy After a Market Pullback -- Including Microsoft (MSFT) Stock
news.Content: It's tempting to want to fill your portfolio with lots of growth stocks. The best do offer chances at astronomical returns -- but they can also be overvalued and just as likely to pull back as to advance. So consider including some blue chip stocks in your mix. A blue chip stock is one tied to a relatively stable, large, established company. blue chip stocks often pay dividends, which can be a big plus. While they may not grow as briskly as some growth stocks will, they can be less volatile. Actually, some blue chip stocks offer impressive growth, too! ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Microsoft (MSFT) is presented as a blue-chip stock with growth potential, currently trading at an attractive forward P/E ratio of 22, below its five-year average.
• Despite increased capital expenditures on AI, the stock is considered discounted and offers a growing dividend yield of 0.9%.
• The article mentions a report on a company providing critical technology for Nvidia and Intel, without naming it.
• Becton, Dickinson (BDX) and Clorox (CLX) are also mentioned as blue-chip stock considerations.

news.Title: Analysis-Huawei bets on speed over shrinking transistors to sidestep US chip sanctions
news.Content: By Eduardo Baptista and Che Pan BEIJING, May 29 (Reuters) - Huawei's new chip design principle focused on boosting transmission speed rather than continuing to shrink semiconductors offers a path for China to build cutting-edge chips despite U.S. sanctions, though whether it represents a true breakthrough remains to be seen. More from Yahoo Scout What challenges does Huawei's new approach face? How do U.S. sanctions impact China's chipmaking? What is Huawei's Tau Scaling Law approach? Is LogicFolding truly different from ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Huawei is developing a new chip design approach focused on transmission speed (Tau Scaling Law) to circumvent US sanctions, rather than shrinking transistors.
• This method, using techniques like LogicFolding, aims to improve chip density, efficiency, and clock speeds, potentially extending progress beyond Moore's Law.
• Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang commented that Huawei's approach is not a threat to TSMC, as TSMC has been using advanced 3D packaging for years.
• Analysts caution that stacking multiple chip layers increases power density and risks overheating, and that production yields and costs remain significant barriers.
news.Keywords: US sanctions, chip design, Tau Scaling Law, advanced packaging, TSMC

news.Title: Barclays resets Marvell stock price target after earnings
news.Content: Marvell Technology has gained more than 200% in the past 12 months. It just reported record revenue, guided above expectations, and told investors that growth would accelerate every single quarter through the rest of the fiscal year. For Barclays analyst Tom O'Malley, that was enough to nearly double his price target in a single note. What Barclays changed and the numbers driving it O'Malley raised his price target on Marvell Technology ( MRVL ) to $275 from $150 and maintained his overweight rating following the company's Q1 FY2027 earnings release on ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Barclays raised its price target on Marvell Technology (MRVL) to $275 from $150, maintaining an overweight rating, citing strong Q1 FY2027 earnings and upward revisions to fiscal 2027/2028 outlooks.
• Marvell expects its data center business to grow 50% in FY2027 and 55% in FY2028, with interconnect revenue projected to rise over 70% year-over-year in FY2027.
• Custom silicon revenue is expected to exceed $10 billion by 2028, driven by demand from hyperscalers.
• Marvell reported record Q1 FY2027 revenue of $2.42 billion, up 9% sequentially, with the data center segment leading growth.
news.Keywords: price target increase, data center growth, custom silicon, interconnect revenue, earnings beat

news.Title: Samsung Electronics ships faster HBM4E chip samples to customers; shares jump
news.Content: By Heekyong Yang SEOUL, May 29 (Reuters) - Samsung Electronics on Friday said it started shipping samples of its latest high-bandwidth memory (HBM) chip to customers, pulling ahead of rivals in distributing a new version of the product critical to ‌AI data centers and sending its shares higher. The South Korean tech company said the new chip, the ...

news.Title: 5-star analyst sets jaw-dropping Nvidia stock price target
news.Content: Nvidia ( NVDA ) stock closed at $212.6 on May 27, down 9.81% from its highest closing price of $235.74 on May 14. The dip comes as a result of a common pattern of volatility for the stock near its earnings report. Nvidia reported its first quarter (Q1) fiscal year 2027 earnings on May 20. Nvidia did two things to try to prevent the dip. The company confirmed an additional $80.0 billion in share repurchase authorization and increased its quarterly cash dividend from $0.01 per ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia (NVDA) reported record Q1 FY2027 results, driven by AI factory demand and increasing capital expenditures from hyperscalers.
• Tigress Financial analyst Ivan Feinseth reiterated a strong buy rating and raised his price target to $425 from $360, implying nearly 100% upside.
• Bank of America analysts believe NVDA is trading below its historical PE multiples, suggesting undervaluation relative to growth potential.
• Nvidia confirmed an $80 billion share repurchase authorization and increased its quarterly dividend, but experienced post-earnings volatility.
news.Keywords: AI infrastructure, hyperscalers, capital expenditures, price target, earnings report

news.Title: 風評：台股衝上44000點　我們正在為後代種什麼樹？
news.Content: 一棵參天大樹能長成今天的模樣，從來不是 一朝一夕之功 ，而是數十年前有人在烈日下掘土、埋種、澆灌的結果。今天台灣引以為傲的半導體產業與AI供應鏈榮景，正是那一輩人在最艱困的年代裡，為我們種下的「乘涼樹」。我們今天所享有的經濟 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 文章探討台灣半導體產業與AI供應鏈的榮景，並追溯其發展歷程，認為是數十年前的戰略佈局成果。
• 作者質疑當代是否僅在收割前人成果，並未為後代種下新的成長樹木，尤其在AI時代的社會結構劇烈變動下。
• 文章指出，AI的指數級成長將導致比「數位鴻溝」更殘酷的「AI鴻溝」，掌握AI者將指數級累積財富與話語權。
• 作者批評部分政治人物過於關注短期選票與GDP數據，缺乏當年「不計任期、只問國運」的戰略決心，並擔憂政治人物利用AI同溫層效應進行社會分化。
news.Keywords: AI鴻溝,產業發展,戰略佈局,社會分化,世代傳承

news.Title: AI耗電激增　台積電：能源效率成晶片發展關鍵
news.Content: （中央社阿姆斯特丹2026年5月28日綜合外電報導）台積電高層主管今天指出，人工智慧（AI）帶動的用電需求激增，已使能源效率而非運算能力，成為未來電腦晶片發展的主要限制因素 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台積電高層主管指出，AI帶動的用電需求激增，已使能源效率成為未來晶片發展的關鍵限制因素，而非單純的運算能力。
• 客戶越來越重視「在不增加耗電下提升效能」，因為電力成本與供電可得性是營運商面臨的壓力。
• 台積電預計從2奈米製程到2028年的A14製程世代，晶片耗電量可降低最多30%，運算效能提升20%以上。
• 除了提高電晶體密度，先進封裝、晶片堆疊及光子技術等方案正變得愈來愈重要以提升效率。
• 文章也提及中國競爭對手華為的「韜（τ）定律」計畫，並指出其受限於無法取得EUV設備，凸顯能源效率對次世代AI晶片的重要性。
news.Keywords: AI,能源效率,晶片發展,製程技術,功耗

news.Title: Ford Stock Is Moving Like Tesla Now. Its Results Can’t Justify the Premium.
news.Content: Ford (F) stock has traded in a tight price channel over the last five years. It has tended to bottom near $10, while witnessing selling pressure above $15. However, the stock has rallied over the last month and is now trading at the highest price level in nearly four years. The rally is a welcome break for investors. The only succor has been the generous dividends, which the company has topped up with special dividends in the previous three years to meet its ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Ford's stock price action, particularly its recent rally, is being compared to Tesla's due to its newly launched energy storage business.
• Ford's energy storage business is seen as an 'AI play' with potential for strong growth driven by data center power demand and the need for energy storage systems.
• Ford plans annual capacity of 20 GWh for its energy storage systems starting next year, which is less than half of Tesla's current annual deployment.
• Despite the rally and optimism around the energy storage business, some analysts like Barclays believe Ford's recent gains have been 'overdone', and Morgan Stanley has a $14 target price.
news.Keywords: energy storage, AI play, market comparison, legacy automaker, valuation concerns

news.Title: Australian watchdog sues Amazon unit over children's backpack safety
news.Content: May 29 (Reuters) - Australia's competition watchdog said on Friday that it has initiated legal action against Amazon's local unit, alleging breaches ‌of product safety labelling laws related to children's backpacks. According to ‌the ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Australia's competition watchdog is suing Amazon's local unit for alleged breaches of product safety labelling laws concerning children's backpacks with button batteries.
• The Australian Competition and Consumer Commission (ACCC) alleges that 'Unicorn Toddler Backpacks' were supplied without mandatory safety warning labels for button batteries.
• 41 backpacks were sold to consumers, and 267 units were held in Amazon's fulfillment centers between June 22 and November 1, 2022.
• The ACCC is seeking penalties, declarations, and costs, marking its first Federal Court case against an online marketplace for mandatory product safety law breaches.
news.Keywords: product safety, regulatory action, consumer law, button batteries, compliance breach

news.Title: Anthropic Just Delivered Spectacular News For Amazon and Alphabet
news.Content: It isn't quite David defeating Goliath, but Anthropic just did something few would have thought possible a few years ago. The company is now the most valuable AI start-up in the world, surpassing OpenAI with its latest funding round. The owner of the Claude chatbot just closed its Series H round, valuing the company at $965 billion. Anthropic raised $65 billion from investors, including ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Anthropic, an AI startup, has raised $65 billion in its latest funding round, valuing the company at $965 billion, surpassing OpenAI.
• Amazon (AMZN) and Alphabet (GOOGL) are significant investors in Anthropic, with Amazon investing $13 billion (with a further $20 billion pledged) and Alphabet investing up to $40 billion (on top of $13 billion already invested).
• Anthropic's revenue run rate reached $47 billion, and its new Claude Opus 4.8 model outperforms other publicly available AI platforms in benchmarks.
• The funding will be used to expand compute capacity, including significant cloud infrastructure spending with Amazon Web Services (AWS) and Google Cloud.
• Anthropic has pledged to spend $100 billion on AWS and $200 billion on Google Cloud over the next five to ten years.
news.Keywords: AI startup, venture capital, cloud infrastructure, strategic investment, valuation
